name: cdu-neuss/cdu-brand
description: CDU brand template components for Laravel (Blade), Twig, and Statamic (Antlers)

suggest.illuminate/support: Required for Laravel Blade component auto-registration (^10.0 || ^11.0 || ^12.0 || ^13.0)
